name: National Science Fiction Day
description: Celebrates sci-fi storytelling and often coincides with Isaac Asimov’s birthday.

name: National Trivia Day
description: A day to quiz friends, play pub trivia, and celebrate curious facts.

name: National Strawberry Ice Cream Day
description: An unofficial food holiday dedicated to pink, fruity scoops of strawberry ice cream.

name: National Popcorn Day
description: Honours one of the world’s favourite movie and snack-time treats.

name: Squirrel Appreciation Day
description: A quirky awareness day encouraging kindness toward neighbourhood squirrels.

name: National Compliment Day
description: Encourages people to say something kind and lift someone’s mood.

name: Opposite Day
description: A playful day when right might mean left and no might mean yes.

name: Data Privacy Day
description: Raises awareness about protecting personal information online.

name: National Puzzle Day
description: Celebrates jigsaws, crosswords, and brain-teasers of every kind.

name: National Croissant Day
description: A buttery excuse to enjoy fresh croissants and French bakery culture.

name: Groundhog Day
description: Folklore weather day when a groundhog’s shadow predicts more winter.

name: World Nutella Day
description: Fans of the hazelnut cocoa spread celebrate with spoonfuls and recipes.

name: National Send a Card to a Friend Day
description: A reminder to post or leave a thoughtful note for someone you care about.

name: National Pizza Day
description: One of the best-known unofficial food holidays dedicated to pizza lovers everywhere.

name: Inventors’ Day
description: Celebrates creativity and innovation, especially noted in the United States and some European countries.

name: Random Acts of Kindness Day
description: Encourages small, unexpected good deeds toward strangers and friends.

name: Love Your Pet Day
description: A day to spoil companion animals and appreciate the joy they bring.

name: National Margarita Day
description: Bartenders and fans toast the classic tequila cocktail.

name: National Pistachio Day
description: Celebrates the crunchy green nut with snacks, ice cream, and recipes.

name: International Polar Bear Day
description: Raises awareness of polar bears and the Arctic habitat they need.

name: World Compliment Day
description: A global nudge to give genuine compliments and brighten someone’s day.

name: Mario Day
description: Fans celebrate Nintendo’s iconic plumber — because MAR10 looks like Mario.

name: Pi Day
description: Celebrates the mathematical constant π (3.14) — often with pie.

name: International Day of Happiness
description: A UN-recognised day promoting happiness as a shared human goal.

name: World Poetry Day
description: UNESCO’s day celebrating poets, poems, and the power of language.

name: World Water Day
description: Highlights freshwater conservation and access to clean water worldwide.

name: National Puppy Day
description: Celebrates puppies and promotes adoption of dogs in need of homes.

name: Tolkien Reading Day
description: Fans of J.R.R. Tolkien gather to read and discuss Middle-earth.

name: April Fools’ Day
description: The classic day of pranks, hoaxes, and lighthearted news spoofs.

name: World Health Day
description: Marked by the World Health Organization to spotlight global health topics.

name: National Siblings Day
description: Honours brothers, sisters, and the bonds of sibling relationships.

name: National Pet Day
description: A day to celebrate pets and support animal welfare causes.

name: National Grilled Cheese Day
description: Dedicated to the crispy, melty comfort of grilled cheese sandwiches.

name: Yuri’s Night
description: A worldwide space party marking Yuri Gagarin’s first human spaceflight.

name: National Scrabble Day
description: Word-game fans celebrate Scrabble and competitive letter play.

name: Earth Day
description: A global environmental observance for climate action and conservation.

name: World Book Day
description: UNESCO’s celebration of reading, publishing, and copyright.

name: DNA Day
description: Commemorates the discovery of DNA’s double helix and genetic science.

name: National Pretzel Day
description: A salty celebration of soft and hard pretzels alike.

name: Star Wars Day
description: May the Fourth be with you — an unofficial holiday for Star Wars fans.

name: Cinco de Mayo
description: Commemorates the Battle of Puebla and is widely celebrated with Mexican-inspired food and culture.

name: Lost Sock Memorial Day
description: A tongue-in-cheek day mourning every sock that vanished in the laundry.

name: World Bee Day
description: Raises awareness of bees and other pollinators crucial to food systems.

name: World Day for Cultural Diversity
description: UNESCO day promoting dialogue and cultural exchange.

name: National Talk Like Yoda Day
description: A Star Wars fan day for speaking in Yoda’s distinctive word order.

name: Towel Day
description: A tribute to Douglas Adams — always know where your towel is.

name: National Hamburger Day
description: Celebrates the classic burger in all its regional styles.

name: World Environment Day
description: The UN’s flagship day for environmental protection campaigns.

name: World Oceans Day
description: Focuses on ocean conservation and healthy marine ecosystems.

name: National Iced Tea Day
description: A refreshing unofficial holiday for sweet and unsweet iced tea fans.

name: International Day of Yoga
description: A UN observance promoting yoga’s benefits for mind and body.

name: World Music Day
description: Also known as Fête de la Musique — free performances fill streets worldwide.

name: International Joke Day
description: A day to share punchlines and keep laughter circulating.

name: World UFO Day
description: Encourages open-minded curiosity about unidentified aerial phenomena.

name: World Chocolate Day
description: Celebrates cacao and chocolate in every form from bars to hot cocoa.

name: World Emoji Day
description: Created by Jeremy Burge — a global celebration of emoji culture.

name: International Day of Friendship
description: A UN day recognising friendship as a foundation of peace.

name: International Cat Day
description: Created by International Fund for Animal Welfare to celebrate cats.

name: National S’mores Day
description: Toast marshmallows, sandwich chocolate, and celebrate campfire snacks.

name: International Lefthanders Day
description: Raises awareness of left-handed people’s everyday challenges and talents.

name: World Photography Day
description: Marks the importance of photography as art and documentation.

name: National Dog Day
description: Celebrates dogs and encourages adoption of pets in shelters.

name: National Cheese Pizza Day
description: A cheese-only spin on pizza appreciation — simple toppings, big flavour.

name: International Literacy Day
description: UNESCO day highlighting literacy as a human right.

name: Positive Thinking Day
description: Encourages optimism and constructive mindsets for the week ahead.

name: International Talk Like a Pirate Day
description: Ahoy, matey — the famous unofficial holiday for pirate speak and sea shanties.

name: International Day of Peace
description: A UN observance devoted to peace and non-violence.

name: Hobbit Day
description: Celebrates Bilbo and Frodo’s shared birthday from Tolkien’s stories.

name: National Coffee Day
description: Widely marked by free cups and coffee-shop promotions across the US.

name: International Coffee Day
description: An industry-backed global day celebrating coffee growers and drinkers.

name: World Animal Day
description: Raises awareness of animal welfare and the human–animal bond.

name: World Teachers’ Day
description: UNESCO day recognising educators and the profession of teaching.

name: World Mental Health Day
description: Highlights mental health awareness and access to support.

name: World Food Day
description: FAO’s day tackling hunger and sustainable food systems.

name: Halloween
description: Costumes, candy, and spooky fun on All Hallows’ Eve.

name: World Vegan Day
description: Marks the founding of The Vegan Society and plant-based living.

name: World Kindness Day
description: Promotes kindness as a global force for connection.

name: National Clean Out Your Refrigerator Day
description: A practical quirky day to tidy the fridge before holiday cooking.

name: World Television Day
description: A UN day noting television’s role in informing and connecting people.

name: International Volunteer Day
description: Recognises volunteers and community service worldwide.

name: National Pastry Day
description: A sweet unofficial holiday for croissants, danishes, and bakery treats.

name: Crossword Puzzle Day
description: Celebrates the classic grid puzzle beloved by word lovers.

name: Festivus
description: The Seinfeld-inspired “Festivus for the rest of us” with airing of grievances.

name: National Bicarbonate of Soda Day
description: A quirky chemistry-and-kitchen day honouring versatile baking soda.
